query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "kvarn: variance-normalized kv-cache quantization mitigates error accum" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly investigates the same core mechanism (KV-cache quantization) and variables (compression ratio, perplexity degradation, error accumulation) as the user's referenced work, specifically addressing the "Variance-Normalized" aspect through its own asymmetric quantization strategy for Keys and Values. It serves as a canonical related-work entry for the domain of KV-cache compression techniques in LLM inference.
